153 D0500H2_STF_MVMT_DFRNT_FREQ_CD D0500H2_STF_MVMT_DFRNT_FREQ_CD D0500H2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Movement Different Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident is moving or speaking more slowly or the resident is more fidgety or restless. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several
